g.text: • Most restrictive policy wins • Explicit denials cannot be overridden • <10ms overhead (SC-004)
Service ops work for all cases
MUST enable RLS on users, profiles, sessions, audit_logs, all new tables
MUST isolate user data (SELECT/UPDATE own only, empty results for others)
MUST allow service_role bypass, log all usage, minimize scope, protect credentials
MUST protect audit_logs (INSERT service only, no UPDATE/DELETE, owner SELECT)
MUST deny anon writes, allow public SELECT only, prevent user enumeration
MUST provide standard patterns: Owner Isolation, Service Bypass, Soft Delete, Immutable Audit
RLS enabled • 100% isolation • Service ops work • <10ms overhead • 100% test coverage • Security reviewed • Audit integrity • Zero enumeration
